title: Data Analyst
description:
Job Title
Data Analyst Intern
Company Overview
Tech in Rent is a consulting partner that supports businesses in improving decision-making, optimising processes, and identifying opportunities for sustainable growth. We work with organisations across different industries, providing practical guidance and data-driven insights to support business performance and strategic planning.
Role Summary
We are looking for a Data Analyst Intern to support remote data analysis and reporting tasks across ongoing projects. The role will involve working with datasets, preparing reports, and assisting with data analysis to support business insights and decision-making.
This position is suitable for students or recent graduates looking to gain practical experience working with data in a remote, project-based environment.
Key Responsibilities
* Assist with collecting, cleaning, and organising datasets
* Support the preparation of reports using Excel
* Perform basic data analysis to identify trends and patterns
* Assist in maintaining data accuracy and documentation
* Support team members with data-related tasks and reporting
Skills and Qualifications
* Basic knowledge of Microsoft Excel
* Familiarity with SQL is beneficial
* Strong attention to detail
* Analytical and problem-solving skills
* Ability to work independently in a remote environment
* Currently studying or recently completed a degree in a relevant field
What You Will Gain
* Practical experience working with real-world datasets
* Exposure to reporting and data analysis processes
* Experience working in a remote consulting environment
* Opportunity to develop analytical and technical skills
Job Details
* Location: Remote (United Kingdom)
* Duration: 3 months
* Working Hours: 20 hours per week
* Working Pattern: Flexible, Monday to Friday
* Compensation: £15 per hour
Equal Opportunity Statement
Tech in Rent is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applications from individuals of all backgrounds and are committed to creating an inclusive working environment.
